body.title: Redesign ToolLoop: round-based iterations + advisor meta-layer
body.result: VALIDATED: 49 minion tests pass; round-based ToolLoop with advisor signals CONTINUE/REPROMPT/UPGRADE/BLOCKED/CONFUSED/ESCALATE
body.description:
Current ToolLoop runs up to 20 sequential iterations; context grows unbounded (73k tokens on an S ticket); model has no way to course-correct. Two failures on first live run (T-burn-rate-monitor, T-constraint-availability-root) both hit max iterations without producing a terminal signal.

Redesign:
1. Round-based structure: max 5 work iterations per round, max 2 rounds before hard ESCALATE
2. Between rounds: single ADVISOR CALL with a separate reviewer system prompt — not a worker, a meta-reviewer
3. Advisor returns exactly one of 6 signals:
   - CONTINUE — progressing, same model/prompt, start round 2
   - REPROMPT <rewrite> — ticket underspecified; advisor provides improved description; retry round 2 with rewrite
   - UPGRADE — task exceeds this tier; promote worker→analyst→designer
   - BLOCKED <reason> — external dependency missing (no DB, missing env var, file absent); not a model problem
   - CONFUSED — advisor cannot interpret what happened; ESCALATE with extra flag
   - ESCALATE — beyond capability path; hold for CC review
4. Context reset between rounds: advisor summary replaces full tool history, preventing token explosion
5. WorkerResult gains: round_count (int), advisor_calls (int), advisor_signal (str | None)

**Affected files:** devices/minion/tool_loop.py, devices/minion/shim.py, tests/minion/test_minion_device.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite; log every state change and interface crossing per AR-009; test-plan required
**Scope boundary:** Redesign ToolLoop internals only. WorkerEnvelope interface unchanged. InferenceDevice interface unchanged. DONE/ESCALATE signal values in WorkerResult.signal unchanged (Granny dispatch depends on them). Out of scope: changing GrannyDaemon, changing InferenceDevice routing.
**Completion criteria:** `.venv/bin/pytest tests/minion/ -q` passes with ≥5 new tests covering: round transition on no-signal, REPROMPT rewrite carried into round 2 context, UPGRADE signal returned in WorkerResult, context reset between rounds (token count drops), BLOCKED short-circuits without attempting round 2; MINION_RESULT channel post includes round_count and advisor_signal fields
